defaultDescriptions.description: A poster of Big Brother is pinned to the wall, his eyes following you as you move. The caption under the poster reads 'Big Brother Is Watching You'.

room.name: the living room of your flat.
room.description: There is a sofa, a desk and the ubiquitous telescreen. The flat on the whole is dilapidated but not dirty or untidy.

room.name: the kitchen in your flat.
room.description:
The telescreen is blaring brassy music loudly. Through the window to the South you can see the four Ministries rising far above all other structures in the city. Huge gleaming white pyramidal structures, a stark contrast to the grey London skyline. The Party slogans, in black lettering large enough to read even at this distance, are picked out on the Ministry of Truth:
WAR IS PEACE. FREEDOM IS SLAVERY. IGNORANCE IS STRENGTH.

room.name: the hallway outside your flat.
room.description: A large poster of Big Brother is pinned up at the end of the hall. His eyes stare balefully down at you and appear to follow you as you move.

room.name: outside the lift on the first floor.
room.description: The lift doesn't work, you can't remember the last time it worked. The telescreen at the end of hall can see everthing, it is showing a propaganda film about advances in technology. 'We are finally able to bomb East Asia with pin point accuracy' exclaims the Newscaster excitedly. This is exciting news comrades, it should shorten the war by months.

room.name: outside Mrs Parsons flat.
room.description: A poster of Big Brother watches you. The caption under the post reads 'Big Brother Is Watching You'.

room.name: Mrs Parsons flat.
room.description: Mrs Parson's children are young but eye you suspiciously. The smell of boiled cabbage lingers in the air.

room.name: Mrs Parsons kitchen
room.description: The smell of boiled cabbage is almost overpowering.

room.name: the stairwell on the first floor.
room.description: A poster of Big Brother watches you. The caption under the post reads 'Big Brother Is Watching You'.

room.name: the stairwell on the ground floor.
room.description: A poster of Big Brother watches you. The caption under the post reads 'Big Brother Is Watching You'.

room.name: outside the lift on the ground floor of Freedom Mansions.
room.description: A poster of Big Brother watches you.

room.name: outside Syme's flat.
room.description: The telescreen at the end of hall can see everthing, it is showing currently showing a news programme, the Newscaster babbles excitedly about the war.

room.name: outside the caretakers flat.
room.description: The telescreen at the end of hall can see everthing, it is showing currently showing a news programme, the Newscaster babbles excitedly about the war.

room.name: the caretakers flat.
room.description: The telescreen at the end of hall can see everthing, it is showing currently showing a news programme, the Newscaster babbles excitedly about the war.

room.name: the basement in Freedom Mansions
room.description: A smallish room dimly lit by a single low power bulb. It's mainly filled mostly with junk. There is a sturdy iron service door at the western end of the room.

room.name: the top of a manhole leading downwards into some tunnels.
room.description: A rusty iron ladder provides a way down. A locked heavy steel service door leads east.
